name: Desiree Williams
ai_summary: Desiree Williams from Atlanta has childcare experience with children five and under through care.com and seeks full-time Monday-Friday shifts. Her military background provides strong discipline and patience, and she demonstrates a structured conflict resolution approach using separation, listening, and reconciliation techniques. She expresses a clear long-term teaching career goal and sees this role as valuable stepping stone experience.

transcripts.q3: My name is Desiree Williams and I have little experience with kids, but I have helped with some kids on care.com. I love working with kids, and I think to be a teacher in the future. The ages I've worked with is like five and and under. And I think I would make a perfect fit for this job.
transcripts.q4: I am in Atlanta, Georgia. And I want to drive 30 30 minutes max to a shift.
transcripts.q5: I am looking for part-time or full-time. Full-time will be preferred Monday through Friday from 7 a.m. to 6 p.m.
transcripts.q6: To deal with conflict between to 3:00 first separate them. I would then listen to assess what was going on and understand the issue. And then I would make them make up to each other by fist-bumping, or saying, sorry by apologizing, and tell them to have teamwork.
transcripts.q7:
I assessed I would make a great up kid teacher because I have strong discipline from being in the military. I love kids know how to deal with conflict when it comes to kids and anything that come with it. I am very patient and nurturing and I believe I have what it takes to become a teacher.
 And I want to be one in the future, so this would be a great stepping stone for me.
